case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JULIO ROBERTO MONGE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-28-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
